[化] 蓟苦素
[医] 蓟苦素, 洋飞廉苦素

cnicus benedictus.t: [网络] 圣蓟；水飞蓟；圣蓟叶

cnida.d:
n. One of the peculiar stinging, cells found in Coelenterata; a
   nematocyst; a lasso cell.

cnidaria.d:
n. pl. A comprehensive group equivalent to the true
   Coelenterata, i. e., exclusive of the sponges. They are so named from
   presence of stinging cells (cnidae) in the tissues. See Coelenterata.

cnidarian.d: n. radially symmetrical animals having saclike bodies with only one opening and tentacles with stinging structures; they occur in polyp and medusa forms

cnidoblast.t: n. [动]刺细胞(腔肠动物的防御器,生于体壁的外层)
cnidoblast.d:
n. One of the cells which, in the Coelenterata, develop
   into cnidae.

cnidocil.d: n. The fine filiform process of a cnidoblast.

cnidosporidia.d: n. single-host parasites of lower vertebrates and invertebrates

cnki.t: abbr. 中国国家知识基础设施工程（Chinese National Knowledge Infrastructure）；中国期刊全文数据库

cnl.t: abbr. cancel 取消，删去（取消）; cardiolipin natural lecithin 天然心磷脂蛋黄素

cnldoscopy.t: [医] 陷凹镜检查, 后穹窿镜检查

cnm.t: abbr. 用户网络管理程序（Customer Network Management）；集中式网络管理（Centralized Network Management）；新型隐球菌性脑膜炎(Cryptococcus Neoformans Meningitis)

cnms.t: abbr. computer network monitoring system 计算机网络监测系统
